observed_failure.surface: SkillGuard staged installation smoke for the SkillGuard and global-router suite
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the explicit external repository/member binding change was model- and test-green
observed_failure.observed_result: the real staged smoke blocked the sibling skillguard-global-router contract check because the installer omitted the now-required canonical repository root

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the external target resolver became explicit and fail-closed, but the installation smoke caller still supplied only the suite-relative member path
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the model and tests required every non-self installed suite member contract check to carry the exact installed layout root
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: every staged or active suite-member contract smoke binds repository_root to the exact installed layout root and target to the member-relative path

generalized_repair.rule: Installation smoke supplies one explicit canonical layout root for every suite member contract check; no member may rely on self detection or inferred fallback.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: a prepared SkillGuard suite stage passes the sibling global-router contract smoke under the explicit layout root
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: the smoke plan contains the same exact repository-root binding for both SkillGuard and global-router members
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: the repair adds no compatibility flag, alternate resolver, inferred path, or optional mode

required_revalidation: complete staged parity and installed-layout smoke
SkillGuard contract recompilation and currentness check
installation receipt capture and current installed parity replay
claim_boundary: This review covers the installed suite-member repository-root binding in installation smoke. It does not prove target-domain checks, portfolio graduation, router freshness, or release readiness.
